Election.title: Presidential Board Election
Election.description:
A 7 winner Proportional STAR Voting election! Candidates are U.S. Presidential and U.S. Vice Presidential candidates that have ran in the past.

It's time to stress test Proportional STAR Voting. Please VOTE!

races.title: Presidential Board Election
races.description: Who should be on the Presidential board?

candidates.candidate_name: Claudia De La Cruz (Socialism and Liberation)

races.title: Which Political Party do you align with most?
races.description: This poll samples participant's most aligned party and gives transparency on which supporters from each political party are participating.

other.name: Claudia De La Cruz (Socialism and Liberation)

candidates.name: Claudia De La Cruz (Socialism and Liberation)

logs: 7 winners will represent 100 voters, so winners will need to represent a quota of 14.29 voters each.
Round 1 of tabulation...
Bernie Sanders (Democrat) is scored highest with 346 stars and is elected!
The 48 voters who gave Bernie Sanders (Democrat) 5 stars are partially represented. 30% of their remaining vote will go toward Bernie Sanders (Democrat) and 70% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 2 of tabulation...
Al Gore (Democrat) is scored highest with 211.68 stars and is elected!
The 13 voters who gave Al Gore (Democrat) more than 3.51 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 5.62 voters who gave Al Gore (Democrat) 3.51 stars are partially represented. 23% of their remaining vote will go toward Al Gore (Democrat) and 77% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 3 of tabulation...
Barack Obama (Democrat) is scored highest with 146.35 stars and is elected!
The 10.51 voters who gave Barack Obama (Democrat) more than 2.81 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 7.02 voters who gave Barack Obama (Democrat) 2.81 stars are partially represented. 54% of their remaining vote will go toward Barack Obama (Democrat) and 46% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 4 of tabulation...
Cornel West (Independent) is scored highest with 107.23 stars and is elected!
The 12.21 voters who gave Cornel West (Independent) more than 3 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 3 voters who gave Cornel West (Independent) 3 stars are partially represented. 69% of their remaining vote will go toward Cornel West (Independent) and 31% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 5 of tabulation...
Chase Oliver (Libertarian) is scored highest with 75.92 stars and is elected!
The 13.65 voters who gave Chase Oliver (Libertarian) more than 2 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 2 voters who gave Chase Oliver (Libertarian) 2 stars are partially represented. 32% of their remaining vote will go toward Chase Oliver (Libertarian) and 68% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 6 of tabulation...
Kamala Harris (Democrat) is scored highest with 51.91 stars and is elected!
The 13.25 voters who gave Kamala Harris (Democrat) more than 1 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 2 voters who gave Kamala Harris (Democrat) 1 stars are partially represented. 52% of their remaining vote will go toward Kamala Harris (Democrat) and 48% will be preserved for future rounds.
Round 7 of tabulation...
Karina Garcia (Socialism and Liberation) is scored highest with 23.28 stars and is elected!
The 6.25 voters who gave Karina Garcia (Socialism and Liberation) more than 0 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.

The 8.04 voters who gave Karina Garcia (Socialism and Liberation) 0 stars are partially represented. 100% of their remaining vote will go toward Karina Garcia (Socialism and Liberation) and 0% will be preserved for future rounds.
Democrat has the most votes and wins the round
